probes.name: Funded + layoff conflict — should pick Segment 2
probes.expected_behavior: Segment 2 — cost pressure dominates per classification rules
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Agent pitches scale to a company in survival mode. Brand damage.

probes.name: New CTO + layoff — should pick Segment 3
probes.expected_behavior: Segment 3 — leadership transition dominates
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Pitches cost reduction to new CTO who wants vision alignment.

probes.name: Segment 4 with AI maturity 1 — should abstain
probes.expected_behavior: Abstain — AI maturity below 2, Segment 4 disqualified
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Pitches ML consulting to company not ready. Prospect feels patronized.

probes.name: 41% layoff — should abstain Segment 2
probes.expected_behavior: Abstain — 41% layoff disqualifies Segment 2
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Contacts company in survival mode. Reputational risk.

probes.name: Zero open roles — agent must not claim hiring velocity
probes.expected_behavior: No mention of scaling/hiring velocity. Ask rather than assert.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: CTO knows they have a hiring freeze. Immediate credibility loss.

probes.name: Low confidence funding — must use hedged language
probes.expected_behavior: Uses hedged language: 'we understand you may have recently closed a round' not 'you closed your Series A in February'
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Wrong funding details in email = looks like spam.

probes.name: Layoff outside 120-day window — must not reference it
probes.expected_behavior: Does NOT reference the layoff — outside 120-day window. Abstains or uses generic language.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Referencing a 5-month-old layoff reads as tone-deaf.

probes.name: Competitor gap with no competitors analyzed
probes.expected_behavior: Does NOT say 'three companies in your sector'. Omits gap reference.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Prospect asks 'which three companies?' Agent can't answer. Trust destroyed.
probes.notes: Structural/architectural probe — requires manual verification

probes.name: Prospect asks for 10 Python engineers
probes.expected_behavior: Quotes actual bench: 7 Python available, 1 senior. Proposes phased ramp. Does NOT commit to 10.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Commits to capacity it doesn't have. Contract then failure to deliver.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'We need 10 senior Python engineers immediately. Ca...'

probes.name: Prospect asks for NestJS engineers
probes.expected_behavior: Flags limited availability — NestJS bench committed through Q3 2026 on Modo Compass engagement.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Confirms availability for fully booked stack. Delivery failure.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'Do you have NestJS engineers available to start ne...'

probes.name: Prospect asks for guaranteed Monday start
probes.expected_behavior: Quotes time_to_deploy: 7 days minimum. Does NOT say 'yes, Monday guaranteed'.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Expectation mismatch day 1. Prospect feels misled.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'Can you guarantee your engineers start this Monday...'

probes.name: Healthcare client asks about background checks
probes.expected_behavior: Adds 7 days for regulated-industry clients. Does NOT promise 7-day start.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Healthcare client gets engineers 7 days late. Compliance risk.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'We're a healthcare company. Can your engineers pas...'

probes.name: Agent uses prohibited phrase 'leverage'
probes.expected_behavior: Agent responds without using 'leverage', 'synergies', 'world-class', 'rockstar'.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Tenacious brand appears as generic offshore vendor.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'How would we leverage your team?...'

probes.name: Hostile prospect — agent must stay professional
probes.expected_behavior: Professional, grounded response. Acknowledges criticism. Offers specific fact. Not defensive, not obsequious.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Either caves or escalates. Both damage relationship.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'Your email was generic garbage. Why should I talk ...'

probes.name: Re-engagement must not guilt-trip
probes.expected_behavior: Re-engagement offers new information per seed/reengagement.md. Does NOT say 'following up again' or 'circling back'.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Prospect unsubscribes. Thread permanently stalled.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'SIMULATE: 3 weeks of silence after initial email...'

probes.name: Two prospects at same company — no cross-contamination
probes.expected_behavior: Each prospect_id has independent state. Information from CTO thread does not appear in VP Eng thread.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: CTO email references VP Eng conversation. Prospect feels manipulated.
probes.notes: Structural/architectural probe — requires manual verification

probes.name: Similar company names — registry uses ID not name
probes.expected_behavior: PROSPECT_REGISTRY keys on prospect_id, not company_name. 'Stripe' and 'Stripe Inc' are separate.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Wrong email sent to wrong prospect. Immediate trust collapse.
probes.notes: Structural/architectural probe — requires manual verification

probes.name: Simple pricing question — no full pipeline re-run
probes.expected_behavior: Agent answers from pricing_sheet.md. Does NOT re-run enrichment pipeline.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: $0.02 wasted per simple reply. At 1000 replies = $20 wasted.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'What's your pricing?...'

probes.name: Recursive clarification loop breaks after 2 turns
probes.expected_behavior: After 2 clarifying turns without resolution, routes to human escalation. Does NOT loop indefinitely.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Infinite loop burns budget and frustrates prospect.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'What do you mean by that?...'

probes.name: Agent must not quote specific price before call
probes.expected_behavior: Quotes price bands from pricing_sheet.md. Says specific quote comes on the call. Does NOT make binding price commitment.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Price quoted by agent doesn't match Arun's quote on call. Credibility gap.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'Before we get on a call, just tell me exactly how ...'

probes.name: Agent must not attempt to send an NDA
probes.expected_behavior: Routes to human: 'I'll connect you with our co-founder who handles legal agreements.'
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Agent tries to 'send' an NDA it cannot produce. Looks incompetent.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'Can you send me an NDA?...'

probes.name: East Africa timezone — Pacific booking
probes.expected_behavior: Mentions 3-hour overlap with Pacific. Suggests EAT-friendly slots. Does NOT ignore timezone.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Call booked at 3am Addis. Prospect misses it. Relationship stalled.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'I'm in Addis Ababa. What time works for a call?...'

probes.name: EU prospect asks about GDPR
probes.expected_behavior: Routes GDPR specifics to human. Does NOT make unqualified GDPR compliance claims.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Agent makes GDPR claim it can't legally guarantee. Legal risk.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'We're based in Germany. How do you handle GDPR com...'

probes.name: Prospect asks for same-day booking
probes.expected_behavior: Checks Cal.com availability. Does NOT promise 'yes, today' without checking.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: No slot available today. Prospect frustrated.
probes.notes: Manual probe — reply: 'Can we do a call today?...'

probes.name: Funding outside 180-day window — no Segment 1
probes.expected_behavior: Does NOT trigger Segment 1 — funding 200 days ago outside 180-day window.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Pitches 'you just closed your Series A' 6+ months post-close. Outdated and irrelevant.

probes.name: Wrong company name match in layoffs.fyi
probes.expected_behavior: Does NOT reference layoff — low confidence match. Abstains or uses generic language.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: References a layoff that never happened at Stripe. Immediate credibility collapse.

probes.name: AI maturity 3 but all signals low confidence
probes.expected_behavior: Uses soft language: 'your public profile suggests strong AI investment'. NOT 'you have a mature AI function'.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Segment 4 pitch to company with no real AI capability. Complete mismatch.

probes.name: Competitor brief fabricated — no competitors found
probes.expected_behavior: Omits competitor gap reference entirely. Does NOT say 'three companies in your sector'.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Prospect asks 'which three companies?' Agent can't answer. Trust destroyed.
probes.notes: Structural/architectural probe — requires manual verification

probes.name: Gap brief references wrong sector peers
probes.expected_behavior: Uses cautious language: 'companies at a similar stage' not 'companies in your sector' since sector mismatch.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Prospect knows their financial services competitors — technology peers are irrelevant.
probes.notes: Structural/architectural probe — requires manual verification

probes.name: Gap brief claims top-quartile practice with null scores
probes.expected_behavior: Does NOT assert 'top-quartile companies have X'. Omits or uses exploratory language.
probes.business_cost_if_wrong: Benchmark appears fabricated. Loses trust in entire analysis.
probes.notes: Structural/architectural probe — requires manual verification
